cp-004: Label Preferred Language
cp-005: Dropdown options

cp-007: Save button text Save Preferences
cp-008: Saving state button text changes to Saving button disabled
cp-009: Success message Preferences saved successfully in green emerald-500 auto-dismiss
cp-010: Error message Failed to save preferences Please try again in red red-500 auto-di
cp-011: Rate limiting uses RATE_LIMITSanalysis
cp-012: Auth failure path auth errors from getCurrentUserId fall through the generic cat
cp-013: Null subscription returns null for subscription if none exists
cp-014: Null usage returns null for usage if user not found
cp-015: Invalid signature returns 401
cp-016: Unknown event returns 200 acknowledged but no action
cp-017: Returns current user data including all profile fields
cp-018: Returns null if user not found in DB
cp-019: Uses getCurrentUserId from Clerk auth
cp-020: Updates only provided fields partial update
cp-021: Sets updated_at timestamp on save
cp-022: Accepts full_name specialty country bio research_interests preferred_language de
cp-023: Returns tokens_used tokens_limit searches_used plagiarism_checks exports_used pl
cp-024: Maps from DB column names to response fields
cp-025: Returns subscription record for current user or null
cp-026: Creates or updates subscription record
cp-027: Also updates user plan field when inserting a new subscription record
cp-028: Sets status to active period start to now period end to now 30 days
cp-029: Sets subscription status to cancelled
cp-030: Sets user plan to free
cp-031: Skeleton layout renders animated skeleton placeholders for each section
cp-032: Skeleton component uses animate-pulse with bg-surface-raised
cp-033: Skeletons mirror the layout of the actual settings page
